name: Evening Checkout
description: End-of-day reflection on presence, joy, values, pride, and letting go

questions.title: How present do you feel right now?
questions.prompt: Rate your sense of presence on a scale of 1-10.

questions.title: Your joy-moment
questions.prompt: Give one specific moment of joy from today.
questions.example: e.g. first sip of coffee, funny text, smell from walk

questions.title: Think of your values
questions.prompt: Think of an action you did today that aligns with any of them.
questions.example: e.g. kindness: bought my partner a coffee; honesty & respect: delivered clear feedback to X with care

questions.title: Something I'm proud of
questions.prompt: What's one thing you're proud of from today?

questions.title: What do you decide to let go of?
questions.prompt: Release something that no longer serves you.
questions.example: e.g. anger with my investors, fear of failure
